ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImageMagick/ImageMagick
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick
Language: c
ImageMagick is a free, open-source software suite for creating, editing, converting, and displaying images. It supports 200+ formats and offers powerful command-line tools and APIs for automation, scripting, and integration across platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
Language: c
NVIDIA Linux open GPU kernel module source

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ThrowTheSwitch/Unity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ThrowTheSwitch/Unity
Language: c
Simple unit testing for C

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WeebLabs/DSPi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WeebLabs/DSPi
Language: c
A fully featured audio DSP firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040) and Pico 2 (RP2350). Official Discord: https://discord.gg/RCyqxAQ5xS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/httpd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/httpd
Language: c
Mirror of Apache HTTP Server. Issues: http://issues.apache.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asterisk/asterisk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asterisk/asterisk
Language: c
The official Asterisk Project repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: brunodev85/winlator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator
Language: c
Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duixcom/Duix-Avatar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duixcom/Duix-Avatar
Language: c
🚀 Truly open-source AI avatar(digital human) toolkit for offline video generation and digital human cloning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fluent/fluent-bit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit
Language: c
Fast and Lightweight Logs, Metrics and Traces processor for Linux, BSD, OSX and Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iovisor/bcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iovisor/bcc
Language: c
BCC - Tools for BPF-based Linux IO analysis, networking, monitoring, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
Language: c
nRF Connect SDK main repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obsproject/obs-studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obsproject/obs-studio
Language: c
OBS Studio - Free and open source software for live streaming and screen recording

ns0:entry.ns0:title: php/php-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/php/php-src
Language: c
The PHP Interpreter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: signalwire/freeswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/signalwire/freeswitch
Language: c
FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a versatile software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. From a Raspberry PI to a multi-core server, FreeSWITCH can unlock the telecommunications potential of any device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
Language: c
Scripts which perform an installable binary image build for SONiC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unicorn-engine/unicorn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unicorn-engine/unicorn
Language: c
Unicorn CPU emulator framework (ARM, AArch64, M68K, Mips, Sparc, PowerPC, RiscV, S390x, TriCore, X86)
